strategy: Use the three Malughast's Feints he gives you rather than your own Feints; a normal Feint just makes him strip it with a double Cleanse Ward that Indemnity cannot protect.
Casting Malughast's Feint triggers his all-ally Sacrifice, which hits allies for 1,000 but heals your whole team 1,000 (1,370 with outgoing healing), so it doubles as sustain when your Health is up.
Stack Malughast's Feints on him, blade your hitter, and land one big hit into the piled traps.
He resists Balance 68% and has strong outgoing and incoming healing, so cut his healing where you can and pack Cleanse or Triage if his Curse and Sacrifice pressure you.
cheatNotes: At the start he gives every wizard three copies of 'Malughast's Feint'; these are the traps you actually want to use.
Casting a Malughast's Feint makes him cast an all-ally Sacrifice: 1,000 damage to all allies but also 1,000 healing to every wizard (1,370 with outgoing healing).
Casting any normal Feint makes him Cleanse Ward himself twice, and Indemnity cannot protect the removal.
